name: Chocolate Chip Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped chocolate or chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F and prepare the muffin pans.
2. In a large bowl, thoroughly blend the butter or margarine and sugar until smooth.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in the milk, yogurt, and vanilla essence.
5. Mix in the chocolate chips.
6. Gently fold the self-raising flour into the wet mixture until just combined.
7. Divide the batter evenly among the prepared muffin cups.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
9. Makes 12-14 muffins.
Variations:
Double Choc: Add 2 tablespoons cocoa powder blended with 4 tablespoons boiling water to the wet mixture.
Choc & Raisin &/or Pecan: Add 1/2 cup chopped raisins and/or 1/2 cup chopped pecans to the wet mixture of Chocolate or Double Chocolate muffins.
Chocolate Macaroon: Add 1/2 cup desiccated coconut to any of the above recipes.
